theme_strategy.rationale: To serve as a healthier alternative to X, the UI avoids the toxic, hyper-glossy or cold-corporate tech look. Instead, it uses soft pastels (mint, lavender, butter) grounded by sharp, high-contrast borders (Neo-Brutalism) to feel both friendly and structured.

rules: Headings strictly use tight tracking to look engineered and modern.
Use explicit active and hover text color changes.

spacing_and_layout.global_spacing: Generous. p-6 or p-8 for post items. gap-6 between feed components.

layout_mapping.sidebar_right: col-span-3 sticky top-0 h-screen py-8 hidden lg:block

borders_and_surfaces.posts: Cardless feel, delineated by 1px hard borders (border-b) between items instead of floating cards.
borders_and_surfaces.containers: Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl with hard 1px border. No soft shadows. If shadow is used, it must be solid (e.g., 4px 4px 0px #111111) for Neo-Brutalist pop.
borders_and_surfaces.avatars: Use rounded-xl instead of full circles to distinguish from legacy platforms.

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Add active:translate-y-0.5 for tactile press. Primary CTA is solid pale mint with black text.
components.tabs: Minimalist. No pill backgrounds. Underline indicator for active tab (For You / Following).
components.inputs: Hard borders, ring-primary on focus. Rounded-xl.
components.post_actions: Phosphor icons (Heart, ArrowsClockwise, ChatTeardrop, BookmarkSimple). Hovering highlights the icon in its respective color (e.g., Heart to accent_lavender) and subtle background tint.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle background shifts. Elements lift slightly or cast a hard drop-shadow.
motion_and_interaction.microinteractions: Heart/Like icon has a quick spring scale effect on click.

hero_light.description: Abstract pastel brutalist background for light mode auth/landing page.

hero_dark.description: Abstract dark brutalist background for dark mode auth/landing page.

rules: Use avatars for mock posts in the feed.
Hero backgrounds should be used on Auth (login/signup) split screens.
All interactive elements must have data-testid. Examples: data-testid='post-submit-button', data-testid='like-button', data-testid='feed-tab-following'

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Outfit and Figtree.
Implement light/dark mode toggling using next-themes or manually via class strategies. Ensure the border colors and backgrounds flip accordingly.
Use standard Shadcn components but strip away the default Vercel-like soft shadows and radii. Replace with rounded-xl and hard 1px borders.
Ensure the layout mimics a 3-column split (Nav, Feed, Trending) on desktop.
Never use placeholder image services. Rely on the media_and_assets URLs provided above.
